narrative:
Cynthian Township has 1,373 registered voters, with 53.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 38.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 7.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 30.8 percentage points.
